name: ClassDescription
description: Implementation of the 'ClassDescription' model. Represents a class definition. The class meets at the start time, goes until the end time.

Active.description:
When `true`, indicates that the business can assign this class description to new class schedules.
When `false`, indicates that the business cannot assign this class description to new class schedules.

Description.description: The long version of the class description.
Description.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

ImageURL.description: The class description's image URL, if any. If it does not exist, nothing is returned.

LastUpdated.description: The date this class description was last modified.

Level.description: The level information about this class.

Name.description: The name of this class description.

Notes.description: Any notes about the class description.
Notes.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

Program.description: Contains information about the class description's program.

SessionType.description: Contains information about the class description's session type.

Category.description: The category of this class description.

CategoryId.description: The category ID of this class description.

Subcategory.description: The subcategory of this class description.

SubcategoryId.description: The subcategory ID of this class description.
